fallback_policy.sort: priority ASC, created_at ASC, id ASC
fallback_policy.candidate_cap: score at most --candidate-limit ready candidates; 0 means unlimited
fallback_policy.exhaustion_behavior: if scoring evidence is tied or incomplete, preserve fallback rank
